recommendations.title: Survivor
recommendations.overview: A Foreign Service Officer in London tries to prevent a terrorist attack set to hit New York, but is forced to go on the run when she is framed for crimes she did not commit.

recommendations.title: The Raven
recommendations.overview: A fictionalized account of the last days of Edgar Allan Poe's life, in which the poet is in pursuit of a serial killer whose murders mirror those in the writer's stories.

recommendations.title: Ninja Assassin
recommendations.overview: Ninja Assassin follows Raizo, one of the deadliest assassins in the world. Taken from the streets as a child, he was transformed into a trained killer by the Ozunu Clan, a secret society whose very existence is considered a myth. But haunted by the m

recommendations.title: Breaking In
recommendations.overview: Shaun Russell takes her son and daughter on a weekend getaway to her late father's secluded, high-tech vacation home in the countryside. The family soon gets an unwelcome surprise when four men break into the house to find hidden money. After managin

recommendations.title: The Imitation Game
recommendations.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, dur

recommendations.title: Offender
recommendations.overview: Justice needs to be served at Britain's most notorious young offenders institute.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: An American tourist and a troubled young woman are chased by her gang leader brother to a top secret British government facility that conducts experiments on children.

recommendations.title: Scum
recommendations.overview: Powerful, uncompromising drama about two boys' struggle for survival in the nightmare world of Britain's notorious Borstal Reformatory.

recommendations.title: Hurricane
recommendations.overview: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.

recommendations.title: Barb Wire
